title: Usage Tracking
description: Token and turn usage: daily consumption, turns, context utilization

panels.title: Daily Token Usage
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, SUM(CAST(runtime_input_tokens AS BIGINT)) as input_tokens, SUM(CAST(runtime_output_tokens AS BIGINT)) as output_tokens FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Turns
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, SUM(CAST(runtime_num_turns AS INT)) as total_turns, COUNT(*) as runs FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_num_turns IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Context Window Utilization (%)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(AVG(CAST(session_context_pct AS DOUBLE)), 1) as utilization_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'ambient.session' AND session_context_pct IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Cumulative Monthly Tokens
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as month, SUM(CAST(runtime_input_tokens AS BIGINT)) as input_tokens, SUM(CAST(runtime_output_tokens AS BIGINT)) as output_tokens FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '90 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

panels.title: Top Token-Consuming Runs
panels.query: SELECT trace_id, CAST(runtime_input_tokens AS BIGINT) + CAST(runtime_output_tokens AS BIGINT) as total_tokens, CAST(runtime_num_turns AS INT) as turns FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND operation_name = 'runtime.spawn_agent' AND runtime_input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 20
